03Tools I've Built

Apps I designed & vibe-coded

Offline HTML apps built with AI assistance for real personal and professional use — running entirely in the browser. No internet, no installation, no subscription.

⚙️ Process Engineering · Offline HTML App

ProcessIQ — Capability & DOE Builder

HTML · JavaScript · Statistical Analysis · DOE
CSV in → scatter plots, correlation maps & DOE analysis out, with an "Improved / Declined" verdict.
💡 Born from 14+ years of TI process optimization — the tool I wished existed on the shop floor.
💾 Data Analytics · Offline HTML App

SQLGOD — Visual SQL Query Builder

HTML · JavaScript · 7 Database Engines
Visual query builder for SQL, Oracle, MySQL, Postgres, MSSQL, SQLite & BigQuery with Elite scoring.
💡 Every data analyst needs a Swiss Army knife for SQL — SQLGOD is mine.
📈 Finance · Offline HTML App

Edge Log — Trading Journal & Analytics

HTML · Chart.js · Financial Analytics
Equity curve, drawdown, R-multiple distribution & monthly P&L heatmap in a dark command center.
💡 Built to apply data discipline to trading — because gut feel is not a strategy.
📋 Project Management · Offline HTML App

FlowDesk — Task & Project Manager

HTML · JavaScript · Pomodoro · Multi-workspace
Dashboard, Board, Ideas, Schedule & Priority views — 200+ tasks across 8 workspaces, one offline file.
💡 102 Upwork projects needed a system — FlowDesk is how I stay on top of everything.
📊 Statistical Analysis · Offline HTML App

StatCompare Pro — Statistical Analysis

HTML · Chart.js · SPC
Box plots, histograms, capability studies & insights — a full Upload → Clean → Analyze → Export pipeline.
💡 Minitab costs thousands per seat — StatCompare Pro costs zero and runs offline in 3 seconds.
🤖 AI / LLM Tools · Offline HTML App

Prompt Builder — AI Prompt Engineer

HTML · JavaScript · Claude · GPT
Design, score & optimize prompts with 0–100 quality scoring, variable injection & a prompt library.
💡 The best AI results start with the best prompts — I built a tool to make that repeatable.

📌 All tools run 100% offline in any modern browser — no login, no cloud dependency.

★My Story

From video games to a calling

I've always been driven to solve problems using data — leveraging spreadsheets, analytics, and structured systems to improve operations and reduce costs.

Growing up, I was deeply hooked on video games. What started as curiosity about games turned into fascination with computers, systems, and how applications work behind the scenes — which naturally evolved into spreadsheets, analytics tools, and problem-solving through technology.

What consistently frustrated me was seeing organizations make decisions without clear data — especially when simple systems could reveal inefficiencies and opportunities.

When fuel prices started rising, I felt this firsthand. I wanted a clear way to control my own travel costs — no practical tool existed. So I built one: a fuel cost calculator. That's when I realized many individuals and businesses face rising costs with no structured way to analyze them.

💡 I saw a gap: while data is everywhere, practical systems that turn data into decisions are rare. That insight became the foundation of everything I build.

Today, I build simple, data-driven tools and analytics systems that help organizations reduce costs, improve efficiency, and make confident decisions — in business operations and community impact alike.

🎮 Early Passion

Video games sparked a deep curiosity about how computers and applications work behind the scenes.

📊 Analytics Calling

Curiosity evolved into spreadsheets, data tools, and automation — real systems for real problems.

🏭 Engineering Impact

14+ years at Texas Instruments — $3.1M+ savings, LRR improvement, and data-driven process engineering.

🤝 Community Work

50+ programs and hundreds of volunteers — the same data mindset, applied to community impact.

⛽ The Fuel Calculator Moment

Rising fuel costs → built a calculator → realized practical data tools are rare, but needed everywhere.

🌐 Freelance & Beyond

102+ Upwork projects, majority 5-star — helping businesses globally turn data into confident decisions.
